summary: Re-checked the iteration-2 technical design against every business requirement R1-R50 by reading the design body directly (not just the §11 traceability table); the iteration-2 edits were guide-alignment fixes (F1-F5: controller-materialized reads + documented safely boundary, in-transaction broadcast audit, modal red/scale styling) that preserve coverage rather than change it. All requirements remain genuinely addressed: access/landing (R1-R4) via existing root+Devise and the page-level no-projects empty state; layout/summary (R5-R7) via the 3-panel grid and _summary reading materialized total_count/attention_count/online_count with zero-shown-not-hidden; active pipelines (R8-R18) via Dashboard::ActivePipelines (active-status filter, derived attention_reason distinguishing :awaiting_human from :stuck, max(updated_at, heartbeat) last-active, 4-segment phase indicator, non-color-alone status_badge, attention-first cap-10 sort with see-all, per-row pipeline links); recent activity (R19-R24) via the 4-source merged RecentActivity with plain-language describe, newest-first, per-item links, 15-item window; fleet health (R25-R30) via FleetHealth (online/offline counts, per-worker name/status/last-heard, staleness via worker.status, role-coverage-gap warning, empty state, prominent unhealthy banner); live/freshness (R31-R33) via the per-user Dashboard::Broadcast fan-out across 8 audited post-commit call sites plus fleet turbo-frame polling and the safely/section_error per-panel isolation; responsiveness/a11y (R34-R35); and the full open-questions modal flow (R36-R50) via the open_questions_structured sibling artifact, native <dialog>, client-side per-question compose/validate honoring defaults-as-placeholder, and the PhasesController#answers turbo_stream branch surfacing busy/blank without navigating away. No over-design: the structured-artifact addition traces to R39/R40, the inline _define_panel form removal to the confirmed Q14 default, and the per-user stream to R31/R44 — nothing is built that no requirement or confirmed default asks for. One non-blocking observation carried from iteration 1 (unchanged): HomeController#fleet_health's poll endpoint still doesn't wrap its query in safely, so a failure on periodic frame reload would surface a raw error rather than the R33 section-error message; R33 is satisfied on initial load and this is a Build-level implementation detail the design's stated intent already covers.
